259	## 5. 团队分工建议
260	### 产品经理
261	- 管理 PRD、优先级、功能边界
262	- 定义妆容模板和推荐逻辑规则
263	- 编写关键页面文案与用户访谈提纲
264	
265	### 设计师
266	- 负责首页、推荐页、教学页、结果页设计
267	- 定义教学提示组件、状态反馈组件、空状态页面
268	- 跟进相机页实际遮挡和可读性问题
269	
270	### Flutter 工程师
271	- 负责页面开发、状态管理、相机接入、交互实现
272	- 负责服务封装、路由、埋点和性能优化
273	
274	### CV/算法工程师
275	- 负责 Face Mesh 接入、特征规则、区域计算、反馈规则
276	- 输出阈值配置和算法说明
277	
278	### QA
279	- 负责主流程测试、机型兼容、弱网与权限异常测试

303	## 7. 风险提示
304	- 如果 Phase 1 的相机与关键点链路不稳定，后续阶段全部会被拖慢，因此必须优先解决。
305	- 如果规则推荐效果不理想，也不要阻塞教学主流程，推荐模块要支持快速降级为固定模板。
306	- 如果评分误判太多，宁可弱化反馈，也不要输出错误且打击用户的结论。
307

```text
1	# Meet Beauty - AI Makeup Coaching App
2	
3	An AI-powered makeup learning application that provides personalized tutorials with real-time AR guidance.
4	
5	## Features
6	
7	- **Face Analysis**: AI-powered facial feature detection and analysis
8	- **Personalized Recommendations**: Custom makeup tutorials based on your face shape, skin tone, and lip type
9	- **AR Tutorial Overlay**: Real-time visual guidance for makeup application
10	- **Progress Scoring**: Instant feedback on your makeup application
11	
12	## Tech Stack
13	
14	- **Flutter** - Cross-platform mobile development
15	- **Google ML Kit** - Face detection and landmarks
16	- **Provider** - State management
17	- **go_router** - Navigation
18	
19	## Project Structure
20	
21	```
22	lib/
23	  app/                    # App-level configuration
24	    theme/                # Theme and colors
25	    app.dart              # Root app widget
26	    router.dart           # Navigation routes
27	  core/                   # Core utilities
28	    constants/
29	    utils/
30	    logger/
31	  features/               # Feature-based modules
32	    home/                 # Home page
33	    analysis/             # Face analysis feature
34	    recommendation/       # Makeup recommendations
35	    tutorial/             # AR tutorial feature
36	    result/               # Scoring and results
37	  services/               # Infrastructure services
38	    camera/               # Camera management
39	    facemesh/             # Face detection
40	    overlay/              # AR overlay rendering
41	  shared/                 # Shared components
42	    models/               # Data models
43	    widgets/              # Reusable widgets
44	    config/               # App configuration
45	```
46	
47	## Getting Started
48	
49	### Prerequisites
50	
51	- Flutter SDK 3.11+
52	- Xcode (for iOS development)

1	import 'package:camera/camera.dart';
2	import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
3	
4	class CameraService {
5	  CameraController? _controller;
6	  List<CameraDescription> _cameras = [];
7	  bool _isInitialized = false;
8	
9	  CameraController? get controller => _controller;
10	  bool get isInitialized => _isInitialized;
11	  List<CameraDescription> get cameras => _cameras;
12	
13	  Future<void> initialize() async {
14	    try {
15	      _cameras = await availableCameras();
16	      if (_cameras.isEmpty) {
17	        throw Exception('No cameras available');
18	      }
19	
20	      // Find front camera
21	      final frontCamera = _cameras.firstWhere(
22	        (camera) => camera.lensDirection == CameraLensDirection.front,
23	        orElse: () => _cameras.first,
24	      );
25	
26	      _controller = CameraController(
27	        frontCamera,
28	        ResolutionPreset.high,
29	        enableAudio: false,
30	        imageFormatGroup: ImageFormatGroup.nv21,
31	      );
32	
33	      await _controller!.initialize();
34	      _isInitialized = true;
35	    } catch (e) {
36	      debugPrint('Camera initialization error: $e');
37	      rethrow;
38	    }
39	  }
40	
41	  void startImageStream(Function(CameraImage) onImage) {
42	    if (_controller == null || !_isInitialized) return;
43	    _controller!.startImageStream((image) => onImage(image));
44	  }
45	
46	  void stopImageStream() {
47	    if (_controller == null || !_isInitialized) return;
48	    if (_controller!.value.isStreamingImages) {
49	      _controller!.stopImageStream();
50	    }
51	  }
52	
53	  void dispose() {
54	    _controller?.dispose();
55	    _controller = null;
56	    _isInitialized = false;
57	  }
58	}
59
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart`

```text
1	import 'package:flutter/foundation.dart';
2	import 'package:google_mlkit_face_detection/google_mlkit_face_detection.dart';
3	import 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_point.dart';
4	import 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';
5	
6	class FaceMeshService {
7	  final FaceDetector _detector;
8	  bool _isProcessing = false;
9	
10	  FaceMeshService()
11	      : _detector = FaceDetector(
12	          options: FaceDetectorOptions(
13	            enableContours: true,
14	            enableLandmarks: true,
15	            enableClassification: true,
16	            enableTracking: true,
17	          ),
18	        );
19	
20	  Future<List<FacePoint>?> detectFace(InputImage image) async {
21	    if (_isProcessing) return null;
22	    _isProcessing = true;
23	
24	    try {
25	      final faces = await _detector.processImage(image);
26	      if (faces.isEmpty) return null;
27	
28	      // Get the first face (most prominent)
29	      final face = faces.first;
30	
31	      // Extract landmarks
32	      final landmarks = <FacePoint>[];
33	
34	      // Face contour
35	      final faceContour = face.contours[FaceContourType.face];
36	      if (faceContour != null) {
37	        for (final point in faceContour.points) {
38	          landmarks.add(FacePoint(
39	            x: point.x.toDouble(),
40	            y: point.y.toDouble(),
41	          ));
42	        }
43	      }
44	
45	      // Lip contour
46	      final upperLipTop = face.contours[FaceContourType.upperLipTop];
47	      final lowerLipBottom = face.contours[FaceContourType.lowerLipBottom];
48	      if (upperLipTop != null && lowerLipBottom != null) {
49	        for (final point in upperLipTop.points) {
50	          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));
51	        }
52	        for (final point in lowerLipBottom.points) {
53	          landmarks.add(FacePoint(x: point.x.toDouble(), y: point.y.toDouble()));
54	        }
55	      }
56	
57	      return landmarks;
58	    } catch (e) {
59	      debugPrint('Face detection error: $e');
60	      return null;
61	    } finally {
62	      _isProcessing = false;
63	    }
64	  }
65	
66	  FaceFeatureResult? analyzeFeatures(List<FacePoint> landmarks) {
67	    if (landmarks.isEmpty) return null;
68	
69	    // MVP: Simple rule-based feature analysis
70	    // In a real implementation, this would use proper geometric calculations
71	
72	    // Calculate face dimensions
73	    double minX = double.infinity, maxX = double.negativeInfinity;
74	    double minY = double.infinity, maxY = double.negativeInfinity;
75	
76	    for (final point in landmarks) {
77	      if (point.x < minX) minX = point.x;
78	      if (point.x > maxX) maxX = point.x;
79	      if (point.y < minY) minY = point.y;
80	      if (point.y > maxY) maxY = point.y;
81	    }
82	
83	    final width = maxX - minX;
84	    final height = maxY - minY;
85	    final aspectRatio = height / width;
86	
87	    // Determine face shape based on aspect ratio
88	    FaceShape faceShape;
89	    if (aspectRatio > 1.4) {
90	      faceShape = FaceShape.long;
91	    } else if (aspectRatio < 1.2) {
92	      faceShape = FaceShape.round;
93	    } else {
94	      faceShape = FaceShape.oval;
95	    }
96	
97	    return FaceFeatureResult(
98	      faceShape: faceShape,
99	      skinTone: SkinTone.unknown, // Would need color analysis
100	      lipType: LipType.medium, // Would need lip measurement
101	      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.medium,
102	      ratios: {'aspectRatio': aspectRatio},
103	    );
104	  }
105	
106	  void dispose() {
107	    _detector.close();
108	  }
109	}
110
```

## 项目进度总结

**Meet Beauty** 是一个 AI 化妆教学 APP，目前处于 **MVP 开发阶段**。

### 已完成工作

| 模块 | 状态 | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| **项目初始化** | ✅ 完成 | Flutter 工程搭建，基础路由、主题配置 |
| **项目文档** | ✅ 完成 | PRD、技术方案、任务清单、用户故事已完整 |
| **路由系统** | ✅ 完成 | 4 个页面路由：首页、分析页、教学页、结果页 |
| **首页 UI** | ✅ 完成 | 启动页布局、功能介绍、按钮导航 |
| **CameraService** | ✅ 完成 | 相机初始化、前置摄像头、帧流控制 |
| **FaceMeshService** | ✅ 完成 | Google ML Kit 人脸检测、轮廓/地标提取 |
| **OverlayRenderer** | 🟡 框架搭建 | 绘制接口已定义，实际算法待实现 |
| **数据模型** | ✅ 完成 | FacePoint、FaceFeatureResult、MakeupProfile、ScoreResult |

### 当前阶段

根据任务清单，项目处于 **Phase 0 → Phase 1 过渡期**：

- **Phase 0 (产品定义与技术预研)** — 基本完成
- **Phase 1 (核心视觉链路开发)** — 进行中

### 待完成的关键任务 (P0)

1. **相机预览与 overlay 层分离** — 教学页需要稳定渲染
2. **唇部 polygon 绘制** — 基于关键点的真实口红叠加
3. **脸颊区域 mask** — 腮红渲染算法
4. **分析页与推荐页 UI** — 完整的流程页面
5. **教学步骤控制器** — 状态机驱动教程流程

### 缺失模块

- `lib/core/` 目录不存在 (constants, utils, logger)
- `assets/` 目录下无资源文件
- 测试覆盖仅有 `widget_test.dart`

### 建议下一步

优先完成 Phase 1 核心视觉链路：
1. 实现教学页相机预览 + AR overlay 叠加
2. 完善 Face Mesh 关键点到唇部/脸颊区域的映射算法
3. 验证实时渲染的流畅度

需要我帮助推进哪个具体模块？

Now I have a complete picture of the project. Let me provide a comprehensive summary.

---

## Meet-Beauty Flutter Project Analysis Report

### Project Overview

This is an AI-powered makeup teaching Flutter application (MVP stage) that aims to guide users through makeup application using real-time face tracking and AR overlays.

---

### Development Phase Status

Based on the task list (`开发任务清单-AI化妆教学APP.md`), the project has **5 phases**:

| Phase | Name | Status |
|-------|------|--------|
| **Phase 0** | Product Definition & Technical Pre-research | **COMPLETED** |
| **Phase 1** | Core Visual Pipeline Development | **PARTIALLY COMPLETE** |
| **Phase 2** | Analysis & Recommendation Flow | **PARTIALLY COMPLETE** |
| **Phase 3** | Step-by-Step Tutorial Flow | **PARTIALLY COMPLETE** |
| **Phase 4** | Basic Feedback & Scoring | **SKELETON ONLY** |
| **Phase 5** | Stability & MVP Launch Prep | **NOT STARTED** |

---

### Features Implementation Status

#### 1. Pages (lib/features/)

| Page | File | Status | Details |
|------|------|--------|---------|
| **Home Page** | `/lib/features/home/presentation/home_page.dart` | **FUNCTIONAL** | Complete UI with feature highlights, "Start Learning" button navigates to analysis |
| **Analysis Page** | `/lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart` | **SKELETON** | UI exists but camera not integrated; uses mock data with `Future.delayed` |
| **Tutorial Page** | `/lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart` | **SKELETON** | Step navigation works; AR overlay uses static placeholder shapes (not tracking real face) |
| **Result Page** | `/lib/features/result/presentation/result_page.dart` | **FUNCTIONAL** | Score display, stars, feedback tags working (based on step completion, not actual CV analysis) |

#### 2. Controllers (lib/features/*/application/)

| Controller | Status | Details |
|------------|--------|---------|
| **AnalysisController** | SKELETON | Mock analysis with hardcoded result (oval face, warm skin, medium lips) |
| **RecommendationController** | FUNCTIONAL | Rule-based recommendations implemented; generates makeup profiles based on features |
| **TutorialController** | FUNCTIONAL | Full step state machine (idle/running/paused/completed), previous/next/skip logic works |
| **ScoringController** | FUNCTIONAL | Calculates score based on step completion rate (not CV-based analysis) |

#### 3. Services (lib/services/)

| Service | Status | Details |
|---------|--------|---------|
| **CameraService** | SKELETON | `camera` package integrated; initialization and streaming methods exist but **NOT CONNECTED** to pages |
| **FaceMeshService** | SKELETON | `google_mlkit_face_detection` integrated; face contour/landmark extraction implemented but **NOT CONNECTED** to real camera stream |
| **OverlayRenderer** | SKELETON | Static geometric shapes (ovals) drawn; does NOT use actual face landmarks for positioning |

---

### What's Implemented vs Missing

#### Implemented (Functional Skeleton)
- Complete routing with `go_router` (4 pages)
- State management with `Provider`
- Theme system (light/dark)
- Data models: `FaceFeatureResult`, `MakeupProfile`, `TutorialStep`, `ScoreResult`
- Tutorial step state machine
- Rule-based recommendation logic
- Result scoring based on step completion
- Basic UI for all 4 main pages

#### Missing / TODO Items Found in Code

1. **Camera Integration** (Critical - Phase 1)
   - `/lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart:47-68`: Camera placeholder shown, not real preview
   - `/lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart:22-23`: `// TODO: Initialize camera and face detection`
   - `/lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart:27`: `// TODO: Perform actual face analysis`

2. **Real Face Tracking** (Critical - Phase 1)
   - `/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart:9`: Using Google ML Kit (not MediaPipe Face Mesh as planned)
   - Services exist but are never instantiated or called in the app flow

3. **AR Overlay with Landmarks** (Critical - Phase 1)
   - `/lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart:13-14`: `// MVP: Use predefined indices... Real implementation would extract actual lip contour points`
   - `/lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart:155`: `// TODO: Implement actual AR overlay rendering`
   - `/lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart:176`: `// TODO: Implement actual overlay rendering based on face landmarks`

4. **Recommendation Page Missing** (Phase 2)
   - Controller exists (`recommendation_controller.dart`) but **NO presentation page**
   - Route `/recommendation` not defined in router
   - Flow jumps directly from analysis to tutorial

5. **Real Face Analysis** (Phase 2)
   - `/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart:99`: `skinTone: SkinTone.unknown, // Would need color analysis`
   - `/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart:100`: `lipType: LipType.medium, // Would need lip measurement`

6. **CV-Based Scoring** (Phase 4)
   - Current scoring only counts completed steps, not actual makeup application quality

---

### Next Priority Features (Based on Roadmap)

According to the development roadmap, **Phase 1** should be completed before moving to later phases. The highest priority items are:

#### P0 (Critical Path)
1. **Connect Camera to Analysis Page**
   - Initialize `CameraService` in `AnalysisController`
   - Display real camera preview instead of placeholder

2. **Connect FaceMeshService to Camera Stream**
   - Process camera frames with face detection
   - Extract real face landmarks

3. **Integrate Real Face Landmarks into Tutorial Overlay**
   - Pass landmarks from camera to `OverlayRenderer`
   - Position overlay based on actual lip/cheek coordinates

4. **Create Recommendation Page**
   - Build `/lib/features/recommendation/presentation/recommendation_page.dart`
   - Add route to router
   - Wire up `RecommendationController`

---

### Key Files Reference

| Category | Path |
|----------|------|
| Task List | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/开发任务清单-AI化妆教学APP.md` |
| Router | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/app/router.dart` |
| Camera Service | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/camera/camera_service.dart` |
| Face Mesh Service | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart` |
| Tutorial Controller | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/features/tutorial/application/tutorial_controller.dart` |
| Analysis Controller | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart` |
| Recommendation Controller | `/Users/limingkun/Documents/code/sideline/meet-beauty/lib/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart` |

---

### Summary

The project is currently at **Phase 1 partially complete**. The app skeleton is well-structured with:
- All 4 main pages built
- State management and routing configured
- Tutorial flow logic implemented
- Models and controllers scaffolded

However, the **critical camera-to-AR pipeline is NOT connected**. The services exist but are isolated from the UI. The next development priority should be integrating `CameraService` and `FaceMeshService` into the actual app flow to achieve the Phase 1 acceptance criteria: "Lip and cheek areas can stably follow face movement."

# 下一个功能开发计划：相机与人脸追踪集成

## Context

项目目前处于 **Phase 1 部分完成** 状态。核心问题：
- 相机服务 (`CameraService`) 已实现但未连接到 UI
- 人脸检测服务 (`FaceMeshService`) 已实现但未连接到相机流
- AR 覆盖层 (`OverlayRenderer`) 使用静态形状，未使用真实人脸关键点
- 推荐页面缺失（有 Controller 无 View）

根据任务清单，Phase 1 的验收标准是：
> "唇部和腮红区域可稳定跟随人脸移动"

## 推荐方案：Phase 1 核心视觉链路集成

### Step 1: 创建推荐页面 (RecommendationPage)

**文件**: `lib/features/recommendation/presentation/recommendation_page.dart`

实现推荐结果展示页面，连接分析结果与教学流程：
- 显示面部分析结果（脸型、肤色、唇形）
- 展示推荐妆容卡片列表
- "开始学习"按钮跳转到教学页

### Step 2: 连接相机到分析页

**文件**: `lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart`

- 初始化 `CameraService`
- 显示真实相机预览（替换当前占位符）
- 请求相机权限

### Step 3: 连接人脸检测到相机流

**文件**: `lib/features/analysis/application/analysis_controller.dart`

- 将相机帧传递给 `FaceMeshService`
- 提取人脸关键点数据
- 触发真实面部分析（脸型、唇形估算）

### Step 4: 实现真实 AR 覆盖层

**文件**: `lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart`

- 使用真实人脸关键点定位唇部 polygon
- 使用关键点计算脸颊中心位置
- 在教学页面显示动态追踪的 AR 效果

## 关键文件

| 文件 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| `lib/services/camera/camera_service.dart` | 相机初始化与帧流控制 |
| `lib/services/facemesh/face_mesh_service.dart` | 人脸检测与关键点提取 |
| `lib/services/overlay/overlay_renderer.dart` | AR 覆盖层渲染 |
| `lib/features/analysis/presentation/analysis_page.dart` | 分析页面 UI |
| `lib/features/tutorial/presentation/tutorial_page.dart` | 教学页面 UI |
| `lib/app/router.dart` | 路由配置（需添加推荐页） |

## 验证方法

1. 运行应用后点击 "Start Learning"
2. 分析页应显示真实相机预览
3. 人脸进入画面后应检测到关键点
4. 推荐页应显示基于分析结果的妆容建议
5. 教学页的 AR 覆盖层应跟随人脸移动

## 可复用代码

- `CameraService` 的 `initialize()` 和 `startImageStream()` 方法已实现
- `FaceMeshService.detectFace()` 和 `analyzeFeatures()` 已实现
- `TutorialController` 状态机已完成，可直接使用
- `RecommendationController` 的推荐逻辑已实现

## 风险提示

- iOS/Android 相机权限需要在 `Info.plist` 和 `AndroidManifest.xml` 中声明
- 实时人脸追踪可能影响性能，需要优化帧处理频率

5	class RecommendationController extends ChangeNotifier {

14	  void generateRecommendations(FaceFeatureResult features) {
15	    _isLoading = true;
16	    notifyListeners();
17	
18	    // MVP: Rule-based recommendations
19	    _recommendations = _getDefaultRecommendations(features);
20	
21	    // Select first recommendation by default
22	    if (_recommendations.isNotEmpty) {
23	      _selectedProfile = _recommendations.first;
24	    }
25	
26	    _isLoading = false;
27	    notifyListeners();
28	  }

1	import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
2	
3	/// Target region for makeup application
4	enum TargetRegion {
5	  lips,
6	  leftCheek,
7	  rightCheek,
8	  leftEye,
9	  rightEye,
10	  eyebrows,
11	  nose,
12	  forehead,
13	}
14	
15	/// Overlay style configuration
16	class OverlayStyle {
17	  final Color color;
18	  final double opacity;
19	  final bool showBorder;
20	  final Color? borderColor;
21	  final double? borderWidth;
22	
23	  const OverlayStyle({
24	    required this.color,
25	    this.opacity = 0.5,
26	    this.showBorder = false,
27	    this.borderColor,
28	    this.borderWidth,
29	  });
30	
31	  factory OverlayStyle.fromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
32	    return OverlayStyle(
33	      color: Color(map['color'] as int),
34	      opacity: (map['opacity'] as num?)?.toDouble() ?? 0.5,
35	      showBorder: map['showBorder'] as bool? ?? false,
36	      borderColor:
37	          map['borderColor'] != null ? Color(map['borderColor'] as int) : null,
38	      borderWidth: (map['borderWidth'] as num?)?.toDouble(),
39	    );
40	  }
41	
42	  Map<String, dynamic> toMap() {
43	    return {
44	      'color': color.toARGB32(),
45	      'opacity': opacity,
46	      'showBorder': showBorder,
47	      if (borderColor != null) 'borderColor': borderColor!.toARGB32(),
48	      if (borderWidth != null) 'borderWidth': borderWidth,
49	    };
50	  }
51	}
52	
53	/// Single step in a makeup tutorial
54	class TutorialStep {
55	  final String id;
56	  final String title;
57	  final String instruction;
58	  final TargetRegion targetRegion;
59	  final OverlayStyle? overlayStyle;
60	  final int order;
61	  final Duration? estimatedDuration;
62	
63	  const TutorialStep({
64	    required this.id,
65	    required this.title,
66	    required this.instruction,
67	    required this.targetRegion,
68	    this.overlayStyle,
69	    required this.order,
70	    this.estimatedDuration,
71	  });
72	
73	  factory TutorialStep.fromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
74	    return TutorialStep(
75	      id: map['id'] as String,
76	      title: map['title'] as String,
77	      instruction: map['instruction'] as String,
78	      targetRegion: TargetRegion.values.firstWhere(
79	        (e) => e.name == map['targetRegion'],
80	        orElse: () => TargetRegion.lips,
81	      ),
82	      overlayStyle: map['overlayStyle'] != null
83	          ? OverlayStyle.fromMap(map['overlayStyle'])
84	          : null,
85	      order: map['order'] as int,
86	      estimatedDuration: map['estimatedDuration'] != null
87	          ? Duration(milliseconds: map['estimatedDuration'] as int)
88	          : null,
89	    );
90	  }
91	
92	  Map<String, dynamic> toMap() {
93	    return {
94	      'id': id,
95	      'title': title,
96	      'instruction': instruction,
97	      'targetRegion': targetRegion.name,
98	      if (overlayStyle != null) 'overlayStyle': overlayStyle!.toMap(),
99	      'order': order,
100	      if (estimatedDuration != null)
101	        'estimatedDuration': estimatedDuration!.inMilliseconds,
102	    };
103	  }
104	}
105	
106	/// Complete makeup profile/template
107	class MakeupProfile {
108	  final String id;
109	  final String name;
110	  final String description;
111	  final String category;
112	  final Color? lipColor;
113	  final Color? blushColor;
114	  final List<TutorialStep> tutorialSteps;
115	  final List<String> recommendationReasons;
116	  final String? thumbnail;
117	
118	  const MakeupProfile({
119	    required this.id,
120	    required this.name,
121	    this.description = '',
122	    required this.category,
123	    this.lipColor,
124	    this.blushColor,
125	    this.tutorialSteps = const [],
126	    this.recommendationReasons = const [],
127	    this.thumbnail,
128	  });
129	
130	  factory MakeupProfile.fromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
131	    return MakeupProfile(
132	      id: map['id'] as String,
133	      name: map['name'] as String,
134	      description: map['description'] as String? ?? '',
135	      category: map['category'] as String,
136	      lipColor:
137	          map['lipColor'] != null ? Color(map['lipColor'] as int) : null,
138	      blushColor:
139	          map['blushColor'] != null ? Color(map['blushColor'] as int) : null,
140	      tutorialSteps: (map['tutorialSteps'] as List?)
141	              ?.map((e) => TutorialStep.fromMap(e as Map<String, dynamic>))
142	              .toList() ??
143	          [],
144	      recommendationReasons:
145	          List<String>.from(map['recommendationReasons'] ?? []),
146	      thumbnail: map['thumbnail'] as String?,
147	    );
148	  }
149	
150	  Map<String, dynamic> toMap() {
151	    return {
152	      'id': id,
153	      'name': name,
154	      'description': description,
155	      'category': category,
156	      if (lipColor != null) 'lipColor': lipColor!.toARGB32(),
157	      if (blushColor != null) 'blushColor': blushColor!.toARGB32(),
158	      'tutorialSteps': tutorialSteps.map((e) => e.toMap()).toList(),
159	      'recommendationReasons': recommendationReasons,
160	      if (thumbnail != null) 'thumbnail': thumbnail,

1	/// Face shape classification
2	enum FaceShape {
3	  round,
4	  long,
5	  oval,
6	  square,
7	  heart,
8	  unknown,
9	}
10	
11	/// Skin tone classification
12	enum SkinTone {
13	  cool,
14	  warm,
15	  neutral,
16	  unknown,
17	}
18	
19	/// Lip type classification
20	enum LipType {
21	  thin,
22	  medium,
23	  full,
24	  unknown,
25	}
26	
27	/// Confidence level for feature detection
28	enum ConfidenceLevel {
29	  low,
30	  medium,
31	  high,
32	}
33	
34	/// Result of facial feature analysis
35	class FaceFeatureResult {
36	  final FaceShape faceShape;
37	  final SkinTone skinTone;
38	  final LipType lipType;
39	  final ConfidenceLevel confidenceLevel;
40	  final Map<String, double> ratios;
41	
42	  const FaceFeatureResult({
43	    this.faceShape = FaceShape.unknown,
44	    this.skinTone = SkinTone.unknown,
45	    this.lipType = LipType.unknown,
46	    this.confidenceLevel = ConfidenceLevel.low,
47	    this.ratios = const {},
48	  });
49	
50	  factory FaceFeatureResult.fromMap(Map<String, dynamic> map) {
51	    return FaceFeatureResult(
52	      faceShape: FaceShape.values.firstWhere(
53	        (e) => e.name == map['faceShape'],
54	        orElse: () => FaceShape.unknown,
55	      ),
56	      skinTone: SkinTone.values.firstWhere(
57	        (e) => e.name == map['skinTone'],
58	        orElse: () => SkinTone.unknown,
59	      ),
60	      lipType: LipType.values.firstWhere(
61	        (e) => e.name == map['lipType'],
62	        orElse: () => LipType.unknown,
63	      ),
64	      confidenceLevel: ConfidenceLevel.values.firstWhere(
65	        (e) => e.name == map['confidenceLevel'],
66	        orElse: () => ConfidenceLevel.low,
67	      ),
68	      ratios: Map<String, double>.from(map['ratios'] ?? {}),
69	    );
70	  }
71	
72	  Map<String, dynamic> toMap() {
73	    return {
74	      'faceShape': faceShape.name,
75	      'skinTone': skinTone.name,
76	      'lipType': lipType.name,
77	      'confidenceLevel': confidenceLevel.name,
78	      'ratios': ratios,
79	    };
80	  }
81	
82	  @override
83	  String toString() =>
84	      'FaceFeatureResult(faceShape: $faceShape, skinTone: $skinTone, lipType: $lipType, confidenceLevel: $confidenceLevel)';
85	}
86

```dart
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import 'package:go_router/go_router.dart';
import 'package:meet_beauty/app/theme/app_colors.dart';
import 'package:meet_beauty/features/recommendation/application/recommendation_controller.dart';
import 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/face_feature_result.dart';
import 'package:meet_beauty/shared/models/makeup_profile.dart';
import 'package:provider/provider.dart';

class RecommendationPage extends StatelessWidget {
  final FaceFeatureResult? analysisResult;

  const RecommendationPage({super.key, this.analysisResult});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return ChangeNotifierProvider(
      create: (_) => RecommendationController()
        ..generateRecommendations(
          analysisResult ?? const FaceFeatureResult(),
        ),
      child: const _RecommendationView(),
    );
  }
}

class _RecommendationView extends StatelessWidget {
  const _RecommendationView();

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Scaffold(
      appBar: AppBar(
        title: const Text('Your Recommendations'),
        elevation: 0,
      ),
      body: Consumer<RecommendationController>(
        builder: (context, controller, child) {
          if (controller.isLoading) {
            return const Center(
              child: CircularProgressIndicator(),
            );
          }

          if (controller.recommendations.isEmpty) {
            return const Center(
              child: Text('No recommendations available'),
            );
          }

          return Column(
            children: [
              // Analysis result summary
              _AnalysisSummary(result: controller.selectedProfile),
              const SizedBox(height: 16),
              // Recommendation cards
              Expanded(
                child: ListView.builder(
                  padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(horizontal: 16),
                  itemCount: controller.recommendations.length,
                  itemBuilder: (context, index) {
                    final profile = controller.recommendations[index];
                    final isSelected = controller.selectedProfile?.id == profile.id;
                    return _RecommendationCard(
                      profile: profile,
                      isSelected: isSelected,
                      onTap: () => controller.selectProfile(profile),
                    );
                  },
                ),
              ),
              // Start button
              Padding(
                padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
                child: SizedBox(
                  width: double.infinity,
                  child: ElevatedButton(
                    onPressed: controller.selectedProfile != null
                        ? () => context.go('/tutorial')
                        : null,
                    style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
                      padding: const EdgeInsets.symmetric(vertical: 16),
                      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
                        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
                      ),
                    ),
                    child: const Text(
                      'Start Learning',
                      style: TextStyle(
                        fontSize: 18,
                        fontWeight: FontWeight.w600,
                      ),
                    ),
                  ),
                ),
              ),
            ],
          );
        },
      ),
    );
  }
}

class _AnalysisSummary extends StatelessWidget {
  final MakeupProfile? profile;

  const _AnalysisSummary({this.profile});

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Container(
      width: double.infinity,
      padding: const EdgeInsets.all(20),
      decoration: BoxDecoration(
        color: AppColors.primaryLight.withValues(alpha: 0.3),
        borderRadius: const BorderRadius.only(
          bottomLeft: Radius.circular(24),
          bottomRight: Radius.circular(24),
        ),
      ),
      child: Column(
        children: [
          const Icon(
            Icons.face_retouching_natural,
            size: 48,
            color: AppColors.primary,
          ),
          const SizedBox(height: 12),
          Text(
            'Based on Your Features',
            style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.titleMedium?.copyWith(
                  fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                ),
          ),
          const SizedBox(height: 8),
          if (profile != null) ...[
            Text(
              profile!.name,
              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.headlineSmall?.copyWith(
                    color: AppColors.primary,
                    fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                  ),
            ),
            const SizedBox(height: 4),
            Text(
              profile!.description,
              style: Theme.of(context).textTheme.bodyMedium?.copyWith(
                    color: AppColors.textSecondary,
                  ),
              textAlign: TextAlign.center,
            ),
          ],
        ],
      ),
    );
  }
}

class _RecommendationCard extends StatelessWidget {
  final MakeupProfile profile;
  final bool isSelected;
  final VoidCallback onTap;

  const _RecommendationCard({
    required this.profile,
    required this.isSelected,
    required this.onTap,
  });

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return Card(
      elevation: isSelected ? 4 : 1,
      margin: const EdgeInsets.only(bottom: 12),
      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
        side: isSelected
            ? const BorderSide(color: AppColors.primary, width: 2)
            : BorderSide.none,
      ),
      child: InkWell(
        onTap: onTap,
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(16),
        child: Padding(
          padding: const EdgeInsets.all(16),
          child: Column(
            crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
            children: [
              Row(
                children: [
                  // Color preview
                  Container(
                    width: 60,
                    height: 60,
                    decoration: BoxDecoration(
                      color: AppColors.card,
                      borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(12),
                    ),
                    child: Stack(
                      children: [
                        if (profile.lipColor != null)
                          Positioned(
                            left: 8,
                            top: 8,
                            child: Container(
                              width: 24,
                              height: 24,
                              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                                color: profile.lipColor,
                                shape: BoxShape.circle,
                              ),
                            ),
                          ),
                        if (profile.blushColor != null)
                          Positioned(
                            right: 8,
                            bottom: 8,
                            child: Container(
                              width: 24,
                              height: 24,
                              decoration: BoxDecoration(
                                color: profile.blushColor,
                                shape: BoxShape.circle,
                              ),
                            ),
                          ),
                      ],
                    ),
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(width: 16),
                  // Info
                  Expanded(
                    child: Column(
                      crossAxisAlignment: CrossAxisAlignment.start,
                      children: [
                        Row(
                          children: [
                            Expanded(
                              child: Text(
                                profile.name,
                                style: Theme.of(context)
                                    .textTheme
                                    .titleMedium
                                    ?.copyWith(
                                      fontWeight: FontWeight.bold,
                                    ),
                              ),
                            ),
                            if (isSelected)
                              const Icon(
                                Icons.check_circle,
                                color: AppColors.primary,
                                size: 24,
                              ),
                          ],
                        ),
                        const SizedBox(height: 4),
                        Text(
                          profile.category,

                      .toList(),
                ),

              const SizedBox(height: 8),
              Row(

                  Icon(

                    size: 16,
                    color: AppColors.textSecondary,
                  ),
                  const SizedBox(width: 4),
                  Text(
                    '${profile.tutorialSteps.length} steps',
